violations.text: Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. 3-bay guidance provided. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2025
Rodenticide blocks were observed placed outside of a tamper proof box. Rodenticide shall be placed by a professional company. Rodenticide to be disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2025
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2025
A small accumulation of droppings was observed behind the chest freezer in the back storage area. Area to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2025
Under the counter top next to the prep unit was observed with an accumulation of food debris. Area to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2024
The door to the toilet room located next to food storage is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2024

The floors under the main counter and underneath the reach-in had an accumulation of food debris. Underneath the reach-in had an accumulation of rodent droppings. Areas to be cleaned. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2024
The ceiling in the back storage/reach-in area was observed with a hole. Hole to be sealed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2024

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2023

Inspector observed dead rodents and multiple rodent burrows outside refuse area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies.PIC informed to remove dead pests from premises. New Violation. Correct By: 08/03/2023

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings in back storage area and cabinets under 3 bay sink. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 08/03/2023

The outside refuse area was observed with an accumulation litter, trash, dead rodents, and other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. More trash receptables are needed. New Violation. Correct By: 08/03/2023

The floors throughout the back storage area have an accumulation of soil residue food debris, and rodent droppings .The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/03/2023
